original_image_tags: A black-and-white infrared (IR) sensor still. The background is a grainy, uniform grey. Centered in the frame is a small, dark, irregularly shaped object. A white crosshair/reticle with tick marks (labeled "3" on the horizontal axis) is overlaid, centered on the object. The image contains several large, black redaction blocks covering potential text or data fields in the top, left, and right portions of the frame.

elements.description: A black-and-white infrared or thermal image. It features a central crosshair overlay with the number '3' labeled on both the left and right horizontal axes. At the center of the crosshairs, there is one dark, irregularly shaped object. A timestamp in the bottom-left corner reads '12/31/99 18:19:40'. Multiple black redaction bars obscure text fields along the left, right, and top edges of the image.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the core visual content (black-and-white infrared image, central dark irregular object, crosshair overlay with number '3', and black redaction blocks), but Description B adds a timestamp that Description A does not mention, which does not constitute a contradiction.
